title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at CaratLane Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at CaratLane Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with CaratLane Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About CaratLane Advisory Limited:
CaratLane Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CaratLane Advisory Limited!
